mapper.sql: id, username, password, real_name, user_type, phone, email, avatar, major_id, enterprise_id, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT FROM sys_user
AND user_type = #{userType}
AND is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT FROM sys_user
AND major_id = #{majorId}
AND is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, user_type, phone, email, avatar, major_id, enterprise_id, status, is_deleted) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{userType}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{majorId}, #{enterpriseId}, #{status}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_user
username = #{username}, real_name = #{realName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, avatar = #{avatar}, major_id = #{majorId}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_user
AND enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
AND user_type = 'hr' AND is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT majorId, majorName, totalStudents, employedStudents, CASE WHEN totalStudents > 0 THEN ROUND(employedStudents * 100.0 / totalStudents, 2) ELSE 0 END AS employmentRate FROM ( SELECT m.id AS majorId, m.major_name AS majorName, COUNT(u.id) AS totalStudents, IFNULL(employed.employedCount, 0) AS employedStudents FROM major m LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.major_id = m.id AND u.user_type = 'student' AND u.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT u2.major_id, COUNT(DISTINCT jd.student_user_id) AS employedCount FROM job_deliver jd INNER JOIN sys_user u2 ON jd.student_user_id = u2.id AND u2.is_deleted = 0 WHERE jd.deliver_status IN (4, 5) GROUP BY u2.major_id ) employed ON employed.major_id = m.id WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY m.id, m.major_name, employed.employedCount ) temp ORDER BY employmentRate DESC
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE status = #{status} AND user_type IN ('hr', 'teacher') AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE status = #{status} AND is_deleted = 0
